
  // Type_stringlist
  public class Type_stringlist {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var type_list : Vx_Core.Type_list = Vx_Core.e_list
    var liststring : [Vx_Core.Type_string] = []
  }
  // Generic_stringlist_any
  public class Generic_stringlist_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any {
    var backref : Type_stringlist = e_stringlist
    // p_shutdown
    override public func p_shutdown() {
      v_stringlist_shutdown(self.backref)
    }
    // p_type_list
    override public func p_type_list() -> Vx_Core.Type_list {
      return self.backref.type_list
    }
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_stringlist
    }
  }
  // Generic_stringlist_list
  public class Generic_stringlist_list : Vx_Core.Generic_list {
  }
  // Generic_stringlist_type
  public class Generic_stringlist_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_stringlist = v_stringlist_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_stringlist = v_stringlist_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_stringlist = v_stringlist_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_stringlist = f_stringlist(type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
  }
  // v_stringlist_constructor
  public static func v_stringlist_constructor(
  ) -> Type_stringlist {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_stringlist()
  }
  // v_stringlist_create
  public static func v_stringlist_create(
  ) -> Type_stringlist {
    var output : Type_stringlist = v_stringlist_constructor()
    v_stringlist_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_stringlist_register
  public static func v_stringlist_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_stringlist_startup_type()
    v_stringlist_startup_empty()
    return t_stringlist
  }
  // v_stringlist_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_stringlist_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_stringlist
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_stringlist_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = nil
    }
    value.type_list = Vx_Core.e_list
    let listany : v_listany_from_stringlist(value)
    value.liststring = []
    Vx_Core.v_release_listany(listany)
  }
  // v_stringlist_startup - mutating
  public static func v_stringlist_startup(
    _ value : Type_stringlist
  ) {
    let generic_any : Generic_stringlist_any = Generic_stringlist_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_stringlist,
      generic_any
    )
    let generic_list : Generic_stringlist_list = Generic_stringlist_list()
    value.type_list = Vx_Core.v_list_new_from_any_generic_list(
      value.type_any,
      generic_list
    )
  }
  // v_stringlist_startup_empty
  public static func v_stringlist_startup_empty() {
    v_stringlist_startup(e_stringlist)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_stringlist,
      e_stringlist.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_stringlist_startup_type
  public static func v_stringlist_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_stringlist
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/stringlist")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.c_extends_list
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_stringlist_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_any_from_stringlist
  public static func v_any_from_stringlist(
    _ value : Vx_Core.Type_stringlist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_stringlist_from_any
  public static func v_stringlist_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_stringlist {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_stringlist = Vx_Core.e_stringlist
    if let generic_any : Generic_stringlist_any = type_any.generic_any {
      output = generic_any.backref
    }
    return output
  }
  // v_stringlist_copy
  public static func v_stringlist_copy(
    _ copyval : Vx_Core.Type_stringlist,
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_stringlist {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_stringlist = copyval
    Vx_Core.v_reserve_listany(
      [
        copyval.type_any,
        anylist.type_any
      ]
    )
    let orig_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist = Vx_Core.v_anylist_from_any(
      copyval.type_any
    )
    let merged_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist = Vx_Core.v_anylist_from_listtype_anylist_anylist(
      [Vx_Core.t_string],
      orig_anylist,
      anylist
    )
    let msgblock : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = Vx_Core.v_msgblock_from_any(
      merged_anylist.type_any
    )
    var ischanged : Bool = false
    let orig_msgblock : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = Vx_Core.v_msgblock_from_any(
      copyval.type_any
    )
    if msgblock !== orig_msgblock {
      ischanged = true
    }
    if !ischanged {
      ischanged = Vx_Core.v_booleann_issame_from_anylist_anylist(
        orig_anylist,
        merged_anylist
      )
    }
    if ischanged {
      let type_delta : Vx_Core.Type_delta = Vx_Core.v_delta_from_any(
        merged_anylist.type_any
      )
      let listany : [Vx_Core.Type_any] = v_listany_from_anylist(
        merged_anylist
      )
      let liststring : [Vx_Core.Type_string] = v_liststring_from_listany(
        listany
      )
      Vx_Core.v_reserve_listany(listany)
      Vx_Core.v_reserve_msgblock(msgblock)
      Vx_Core.v_reserve_delta(type_delta)
      output = Type_stringlist = v_stringlist_create()
      output.liststring = liststring
      output.type_any.type_msgblock = msgblock
      output.type_any.type_delta = type_delta
    }
    Vx_Core.v_release_except_listany(
      output.type_any,
      [
        copyval.type_any,
        anylist.type_any,
        merged_anylist.type_any
      ]
    )
    return output
  }
  // f_stringlist
  public static func f_stringlist(
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_stringlist {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_stringlist = v_stringlist_copy(e_stringlist, anylist)
    return output
  }
  public static let t_stringlist : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_constructor()
  public static let e_stringlist : Type_stringlist = v_stringlist_constructor()
